subcodes.first_line: Unto Thee be praise, O my God, God of the throne above and of the dust below, my Lord,and the Lord of this world and the world to come, for having awakened me whilst I was slumbering
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک الحمد یا الهی و اله العرش و الثری و سلطانی و سلطان الاخره و الاولی بما
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for tests and difficulties
